test.note: 164 admin tests pass. Full suite (bun run test --run) times out at 8+ min due to volume; pre-existing failures in auth/sales pages are unrelated to design-foundation milestone.

nonBlockingIssues.description: SupportTicketsPage stat cards lost colored labels (Open=info, In Progress=warning, Resolved=success) when migrating to StatCard. Labels now use default tertiary color. A future `labelColor` prop on StatCard could restore this.
Select label lost Users icon since shared Select API only supports string labels, not ReactNode with icons.
Textarea in NotificationsPage remains native HTML since no shared Textarea component exists in the library.
The --color-link-hover token was added to variables.css but not wired into hover states on links. Links use hover:underline but no color transition on hover.

appliedUpdates.description: Added test suite performance note: full suite can take 8+ min and may time out; recommends targeted subset runs for admin work. Documented pre-existing auth/sales test failures.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add note about DataTable's emptyMessage prop limitation: pages using DataTable for empty states (Users, Roles) cannot adopt the shared EmptyState component because DataTable renders its own internal empty message as plain text. Future enhancement could add a `emptyContent` ReactNode prop to DataTable.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: component-unification-emptystate-skeleton review: UsersPage and RolesPage correctly skipped since their empty states are handled by DataTable's emptyMessage string prop.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the two coexisting patterns for applying CSS variable colors: (1) Tailwind arbitrary value syntax `text-[var(--color-*)]` and (2) inline `style={{ color: 'var(--color-*)' }}`. Both are acceptable.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: dark-mode-color-token-fix review: FinanceSupportPage uses inline style for icon colors, other pages use Tailwind arbitrary value syntax.

rejectedObservations.observation: frontend-worker skill deviation for pure refactoring tasks (skipping TDD, frontend-skill, agent-browser)
rejectedObservations.reason: This is a skill procedure concern, not a codebase knowledge item. The orchestrator should evaluate whether the skill needs refinement, but it's not actionable as a library/services.yaml update.
